tool.name: yelp_scrape_menu
tool.description: Scrape the menu from a Yelp restaurant page. Returns menu sections with item names, descriptions, and prices.

parameters.name: business_url
parameters.description: Yelp business URL for a restaurant (e.g. 'https://www.yelp.com/biz/house-of-prime-rib-san-francisco')
